query: { article(id:"a1"){ id title author{ id displayName } heroImageUrl reviews{ id rating readingTimeAdjusted } stats{ views shares } } }
{ article(id:"a1"){ id title ... @defer { reviews{ id rating } } } }
{ search(term:"x"){ __typename ... on Article{ id title } ... on Podcast{ id durationSeconds } } }
{ article(id:"a1"){ relatedContent{ __typename ... on Article{ title } ... on Podcast{ title } } } }
{ asset(id:"v1"){ __typename id url ... on VideoAsset{ transcodeProgress } } }
{ organization(id:"o1"){ id name memberCount subscription{ status seatUtilization } invoices{ id amountCents paid } } }
{ user(id:"u1"){ id displayName reviews{ rating } recommendedArticles{ title } } }
{ user(id:"u1"){ id ... @defer { recommendedArticles{ id ... @defer { reviews{ rating } } } } } }
{ articles{ id ... @defer { reviews{ id } } } }
{ article(id:"a1"){ id ... @defer { stats{ views shares avgReadSeconds } } } }
{ featuredArticle{ id ... @defer { author{ displayName } } } }
{ article(id:"a1"){ id wordCount ... @defer { reviews{ readingTimeAdjusted } } } }
query($d:Boolean!){ article(id:"a1"){ id title ... @defer(if:$d){ reviews{ id } } } }
query($a:Boolean!,$b:Boolean!){ article(id:"a1"){ id ...@defer(if:$a){ reviews{id} } ...@defer(if:$b){ relatedContent{__typename} } } }
query($l:String!){ article(id:"a1"){ id ...@defer(label:$l){ reviews{id} } } }

{ user(id:"u1"){ id ... @defer { reviews{ id rating readingTimeAdjusted } } } }

{ article(id:"a1"){ id title ... @defer { __typename } reviews{ id ... @defer { __typename author{ __typename id displayName } } } } }
